findings.message: MCP tool rejects empty bodyPlain at schema validation, so missing_plaintext/missing_html are unreachable via MCP. Parity claim is overbroad.

Detail contract is internally inconsistent — says 'for each check that fails' but only covers subset. missing_plaintext, missing_html, missing_signature, missing_required_link have no detail behavior specified.
Regenerate route persistence round-trip is not tested.
